Flow.description: CA 03/05/25 - Additional fields Historic or Eligible?, Current Zoning District SB 1/27/25 - Add Budget edit functionality @ menu page SB 1/24/25 - Add budget functionality CC 4/30/24 - added validation errors on long text fields (max 255 character limit because mapped to internal field) CC 1/26/24 - updated property Edit disabled btn | SB - Add Reset Vars CC 1/24/24 - new DataTable component - update Sellers Address fields to map to custom internal fields (to resolve Invalid/Null Country picklist issue) - removing HOME ARP, Rental, Vacant Unit, For Sale unique fields (will collect in application map to Project) CC1/22/24 - tweaked conditional visibility (filters now match updated Ref App Names - HOME ARP vs Rental distinction is based on questions and Ref App Name now) CC 1/17/24 - cosmetic and visibility updates - removed standard Address fields, added custom fields (to resolve Invalid/Null Country picklist issue) CC 1/16/24 - updated conditional visibility, Read Only logic, isComplete logic, Edit property path CC 1/15/24 - additional fields from Rental proforma
Flow.label: Property information [Screen Flow]

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Residential_Floor_Area_Planned_in_gross_sq_ft
fields.fieldText: Residential Floor Area Planned (in gross sq ft.)

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Is_this_project_targeting_special_populations
fields.fieldText: Is this project targeting special populations?

fields.name: Copy_1_of_dt_STARCertificationRequired
fields.fieldText: ENERGY STAR CERTIFICATION IS REQUIRED FOR ALL CDA-ASSISTED DEVELOPMENT EFFORTS

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Heating_System_Sustainability_Certification_in_Addition_to_EPA_Energy
fields.fieldText: Heating System Sustainability Certification in Addition to EPA Energy Star? Please Detail

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Air_Conditioning_Sustainability_Certification_in_Addition_to_EPA_Energ
fields.fieldText: Air Conditioning Sustainability Certification in Addition to EPA Energy Star? Please Detail

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Domestic_Hot_Water_Sustainability_Certification_in_Addition_to_EPA_Ene
fields.fieldText: Domestic Hot Water Sustainability Certification in Addition to EPA Energy Star? Please Detail

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Appliances_Sustainability_Certification_in_Addition_to_EPA_Energy_Star
fields.fieldText: Appliances Sustainability Certification in Addition to EPA Energy Star? Please Detail

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Equipment_Included_with_Income_Restricted_Units
fields.fieldText: Equipment Included with Income Restricted Units

fields.name: Copy_1_of_dt_SiteInformation
fields.fieldText: SITE INFORMATION

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Total_Site_Area
fields.helpText: Related to the purchase of this transaction. Specify sq ft or acres in the text box.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Is_this_site_or_property_in_a_National_or_City_historic_district
fields.fieldText: Is this site or property in a National or City historic district?

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Project_Site_Area
fields.helpText: Related to the utilization for proposed development. Specify sq ft or acres in the text box.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Explain_the_relationship_between_buyer_and_seller_Provide_sales_contra
fields.fieldText: Explain the relationship between buyer and seller. Provide sales contract from last arms-length transaction. If the sales contract cannot be provided at the initial application stage, it will be a requirement to receive a firm Financing Commitment

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Does_current_site_zoning_allow_the_proposed_residential_use
fields.fieldText: Does current site zoning allow the proposed residential use?

fields.name: Copy_1_of_If_no_please_explain_what_steps_have_been_or_will_be_taken_to_obtain_z
fields.fieldText: If no, please explain what steps have been or will be taken to obtain zoning approval

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Are_lots_to_be_subdivided_on_this_site
fields.fieldText: Are lots to be subdivided on this site?

fields.name: Copy_1_of_dt_Are_the_follwing_utilities_now_located_on_the_site
fields.fieldText: Are the following utilities now located on the site?

fields.name: Copy_1_of_dt_check_all_the_conditions_present_at_the_proposed_dev_site
fields.fieldText: Check all the conditions present at the proposed development site?

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Please_describe_any_other_unusual_site_conditions
fields.fieldText: Please describe any other unusual site conditions

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Is_there_anything_in_proximity_to_the_project_that_could_have_a_notewo
fields.fieldText: Is there anything in proximity to the project that could have a noteworthy positive impact on the marketability of this development? Please describe

fields.name: dt_AppReadOnlyHeader
fields.fieldText: At this time the application has already been submitted, and property records are VIEW ONLY in the table below

fields.name: Residential_Floor_Areal_Planned_in_gross_sq_ft
fields.fieldText: Residential Floor Areal Planned (in gross sq ft.)

fields.name: Is_this_project_targeting_special_populations
fields.fieldText: Is this project targeting special populations?

fields.name: dt_STARCertificationRequired
fields.fieldText: ENERGY STAR CERTIFICATION IS REQUIRED FOR ALL CDA-ASSISTED DEVELOPMENT EFFORTS

fields.name: Heating_System_Sustainability_Certification_in_Addition_to_EPA_Energy_Star_Pleas
fields.fieldText: Heating System Sustainability Certification in Addition to EPA Energy Star? Please Detail

fields.name: Air_Conditioning_Sustainability_Certification_in_Addition_to_EPA_Energy_Star_Ple
fields.fieldText: Air Conditioning Sustainability Certification in Addition to EPA Energy Star? Please Detail

fields.name: Domestic_Hot_Water_Sustainability_Certification_in_Addition_to_EPA_Energy_Star_P
fields.fieldText: Domestic Hot Water Sustainability Certification in Addition to EPA Energy Star? Please Detail

fields.name: Appliances_Sustainability_Certification_in_Addition_to_EPA_Energy_Star_Please_De
fields.fieldText: Appliances Sustainability Certification in Addition to EPA Energy Star? Please Detail

fields.name: Equipment_Included_with_Income_Restricted_Units
fields.fieldText: Equipment Included with Income Restricted Units

fields.name: dt_SiteInformation
fields.fieldText: SITE INFORMATION

fields.name: Total_Site_Area
fields.helpText: Related to the purchase of this transaction. Specify sq ft or acres in the text box.

fields.name: Project_Site_Area
fields.helpText: Related to the utilization for proposed development. Specify sq ft or acres in the text box.

fields.name: Is_this_site_or_property_in_a_National_or_City_historic_district
fields.fieldText: Is this site or property in a National or City historic district?

fields.name: Explain_the_relationship_between_buyer_and_seller_Provide_sales_contract_from_la
fields.fieldText: Explain the relationship between buyer and seller. Provide sales contract from last arms-length transaction. If the sales contract cannot be provided at the initial application stage, it will be a requirement to receive a firm Financing Commitment

fields.name: Does_current_site_zoning_allow_the_proposed_residential_use
fields.fieldText: Does current site zoning allow the proposed residential use?

fields.name: If_no_please_explain_what_steps_have_been_or_will_be_taken_to_obtain_zoning_appr
fields.fieldText: If no, please explain what steps have been or will be taken to obtain zoning approval

fields.name: Are_lots_to_be_subdivided_on_this_site
fields.fieldText: Are lots to be subdivided on this site?

fields.name: dt_Are_the_follwing_utilities_now_located_on_the_site
fields.fieldText: Are the following utilities now located on the site?

fields.name: dt_check_all_the_conditions_present_at_the_proposed_dev_site
fields.fieldText: Check all the conditions present at the proposed development site?

fields.name: Please_describe_any_other_unusual_site_conditions
fields.fieldText: Please describe any other unusual site conditions

fields.name: Is_there_anything_in_proximity_to_the_project_that_could_have_a_noteworthy_posit
fields.fieldText: Is there anything in proximity to the project that could have a noteworthy positive impact on the marketability of this development? Please describe
